Package com.example.a3dscannerapp.rendering

Class OcclusionObjectRenderer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.example.a3dscannerapp.rendering.OcclusionObjectRenderer
  • public class OcclusionObjectRenderer
extends java.lang.Object
    Renders an object loaded from an OBJ file in OpenGL.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      OcclusionObjectRenderer()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void createOnGlThread​(Context context, java.lang.String objAssetName, java.lang.String diffuseTextureAssetName)
      Creates and initializes OpenGL resources needed for rendering the model.

      void setDepthTexture​(int textureId, int width, int height)  
      void setMaterialProperties​(float ambient, float diffuse, float specular, float specularPower)
      Sets the surface characteristics of the rendered model.
      void setUvTransformMatrix​(float[] transform)  
      void updateModelMatrix​(float[] modelMatrix, float scaleFactor)
      Updates the object model matrix and applies scaling.

    • Constructor Detail

      • OcclusionObjectRenderer

        public OcclusionObjectRenderer()

    • Method Detail

      • createOnGlThread

        public void createOnGlThread​(Context context,
                             java.lang.String objAssetName,
                             java.lang.String diffuseTextureAssetName)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        Creates and initializes OpenGL resources needed for rendering the model.
        Parameters:
        context - Context for loading the shader and below-named model and texture assets.
        objAssetName - Name of the OBJ file containing the model geometry.
        diffuseTextureAssetName - Name of the PNG file containing the diffuse texture map.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • updateModelMatrix

        public void updateModelMatrix​(float[] modelMatrix,
                              float scaleFactor)
        Updates the object model matrix and applies scaling.
        Parameters:
        modelMatrix - A 4x4 model-to-world transformation matrix, stored in column-major order.
        scaleFactor - A separate scaling factor to apply before the modelMatrix.
        See Also:
        Matrix

      • setMaterialProperties

        public void setMaterialProperties​(float ambient,
                                  float diffuse,
                                  float specular,
                                  float specularPower)
        Sets the surface characteristics of the rendered model.
        Parameters:
        ambient - Intensity of non-directional surface illumination.
        diffuse - Diffuse (matte) surface reflectivity.
        specular - Specular (shiny) surface reflectivity.
        specularPower - Surface shininess. Larger values result in a smaller, sharper specular highlight.

      • draw

        public void draw​(float[] cameraView,
                 float[] cameraPerspective,
                 float[] colorCorrectionRgba,
                 float[] objColor)

      • setUvTransformMatrix

        public void setUvTransformMatrix​(float[] transform)

      • setDepthTexture

        public void setDepthTexture​(int textureId,
                            int width,
                            int height)
